seo.metaTitle: White-Label Reputation Management for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch AI-powered reviews and reputation management under your brand. Reviews Promoter helps SMBs collect 5-star reviews, manage social media, and build trust at scale.

hero.headline: Turn Happy Customers into 5-Star Reviews — Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Online reviews influence every buying decision. But most SMBs don't have a system to consistently request, monitor, and respond to feedback across Google, social media, and review sites.
hero.description: Reviews Promoter is an AI-driven reputation and social media management platform built for SMBs who need a simple way to generate trust, build social proof, and stay visible — all delivered white-label under your brand.

items.title: Collect 5-star reviews
items.body: Request reviews via text message and automatically share positive feedback across social channels.

items.title: Showcase testimonials
items.body: Embed live, positive reviews directly on their website to boost credibility and conversion.

items.title: Manage social media
items.body: Schedule posts across multiple platforms from one calendar, based on demographics, interests, and frequency.

items.title: Monitor everything in one place
items.body: Track reviews, social activity, and competitor feedback across the web — respond from a single dashboard.

features.heading: Reviews, Social, and Reputation — One Platform
features.intro: Reviews Promoter combines review generation, social media management, and competitive tracking in a single white-label platform.

cards.title: Automated Review Collection
cards.body: SMS-based review requests with automatic sharing of positive reviews to social channels. Consistent review volume without manual effort.

cards.title: Centralized Review Management
cards.body: Monitor and respond to reviews across Google, Facebook, Yelp, and other platforms from one dashboard. No more logging into multiple sites.

cards.title: Social Media Scheduling
cards.body: Plan and schedule branded posts across multiple social platforms. Demographic targeting, frequency control, and bulk scheduling in one calendar.

cards.title: Competition Tracker
cards.body: Monitor what customers say about competitors to identify gaps, opportunities, and messaging advantages for your SMB customers.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Tie Your Brand to Measurable Business Outcomes
partnerAdvantage.intro: Reviews Promoter connects your brand to outcomes SMBs care about most: better ratings, more referrals, and increased revenue.

items.title: High-impact, recurring revenue
items.body: Reputation management is a subscription SMBs renew because they see the results — higher star ratings, more review volume, and stronger social engagement.

items.title: Natural bundle with your digital stack
items.body: Reviews Promoter pairs with websites, SEO, and directory listings. SMBs with a site, good SEO, and strong reviews have a complete local presence — all from you.

items.title: Capture growing marketing budgets
items.body: SMBs are increasingly spending on reviews and social management. Offer it under your brand instead of losing that spend to standalone tools.

lifecycleFit.heading: Trust That Amplifies Every Other Service You Sell
lifecycleFit.intro: Strong reviews make websites convert better, SEO rank higher, and directory listings drive more traffic. Reviews Promoter amplifies the value of everything else in your portfolio.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Website Builder, DIFM design, or hosting launches their digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Reviews Promoter builds trust and social proof that drives clicks and conversions.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce and email marketing convert the audience that reviews helped attract.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position reputation management as the trust layer that makes websites, SEO, and listings work harder — a natural bundle partner with directories and Search Everywhere Optimization.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn Reviews into a White-Label Growth Driver?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch Reviews Promoter under your brand, bundle it with your presence and marketing portfolio, and help SMBs turn happy customers into powerful social proof.
